x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'a' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/node/javascript.js:64:5]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :     ^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'b' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/node/javascript.js:64:8]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :        ^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'c' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/node/javascript.js:64:11]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :           ^
 65 | 
    `----

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'd' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.

    :                ^
